headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Super Micro Computer (SMCI) After Recent AI Server Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Super Micro Computer is still attractively priced or already fully valued, it helps to step back and look at what the recent share price performance and fundamentals are really telling you. The stock closed at US$41.64, with the share price falling 9.7% over the last week, rising 20.1% over the last month, and showing returns of 34.5% year to date and 0.2% over the last year, alongside a very large 3 year return and more than 10x over 5 years.
